name: Black Disciples
description: The Black Disciples (BDs) are an African-American street gang with 15,000 members that originated in Chicago. In 1958, teenagers from Hyde Park, Englewood, and Kenwood formed the 'Devil's Disciples' — founders included David Barksdale, Richard Strong, Leonard Longstreet, and Prince Old Timer. In 1966, Barksdale created the 'Black Disciples Nation' to boost recruitment into the thousands. In 1969, Larry Hoover merged his Supreme Gangsters with Barksdale's Disciples to form the BGDN. After Barksdale died of kidney failure in 1974, ideological differences split the alliance into the Gangster Disciples and Black Disciples by 1981. Mickey Bull led the BDs until his murder by GDs in August 1991, triggering permanent war. In 1994, 11-year-old member Robert 'Yummy' Sandifer accidentally killed a bystander and was then executed by fellow BDs. Had 300+ sets by 1974. Present in 10+ states. Notable members include Chief Keef, Lil Durk, and King Von.

sources.title: Almighty Black P. Stone Nation — Wikipedia
